economic_notes: Nation operates grocery store (MCN Foods), gas bar, confectionery, restaurant, half-interest in Pinesiw Energy Limited Partnership, Misipawistik Telecommunications Cooperative (high speed internet), 10040628 Manitoba Ltd. (restaurant), Chus-Chug-U Gaming Trust (VLT lounge), 1/7 interest in Aseneskak Casino. Grand Rapids First Nation Development Trust holds restricted funds from Manitoba Hydro settlement. Hydro claim against Canada in arbitration for damages related to development on traditional territory.
notes: Going concern note due to high debt load of $33,773,270 in variable rate demand loans; prime rate increased from 2.45% to 6.7% after year end. Seven government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis. Four entities fully consolidated (Housing Authority, Gaming Commission, Grand Rapids First Nation Immediate Use Fund, Health Authority Inc.). OSR calculated as total revenue $19,431,418 minus total government transfers $18,860,076 = $571,342. Segment disclosure shows community development expenses $6,243,077 and community learning $1,446,651 but no explicit housing or infrastructure line. Salaries per expenses by object note is $3,510,265 but segment disclosure totals $3,527,915 — minor reclassification difference. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. No budget presented for the year.
